# plot_cohort_overlap { #cdmconnector.plot_cohort_overlap }

```python
plot_cohort_overlap(
    result,
    *,
    unique_combinations=True,
    facet=None,
    colour=None,
)
```

Plot cohort overlap as a stacked bar chart.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                | Type                                            | Description   | Default    |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result              | SummarisedResult from summarise_cohort_overlap. |               | _required_ |
| unique_combinations | If True, show only unique cohort pairs.         |               | `True`     |
| facet               | Column(s) to facet by.                          |               | `None`     |
| colour              | Column to colour by.                            |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                     | Description   |
|--------|--------------------------|---------------|
|        | matplotlib.figure.Figure |               |
